parents.subject: LU-12312 lnet: handle no discovery flag

commit.subject: ATM-1702 - Notify AT admin/patch owners of invalid build configurations
commit.message:
ATM-1702 - Notify AT admin/patch owners of invalid build configurations

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientdistro=el7
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.7.0 serverdistro=el6.6
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.7.0 mdsdistro=el6.6 mdsarch=x86_64 ossdistro=el6.6 \
ossarch=x86_64 clientversion=2.13 clientdistro=el7.7 clientarch=x86_64
Test-Parameters: testlist=runtests ossdistro=el7.8 testgroup=review-ldiskfs \
                 mdsdistro=el7 env=SANITY_EXCEPT="101g 102i" clientdistro=el8.1 \
                 mdsarch=x86_64  clientarch=x86_64 \
                 ossarch=x86_64

Change-Id: I46664daa204f25c159421a431f8adb6410fa89f4
Signed-off-by: Charlie Olmstead <charlie@whamcloud.com>
